CustomField.description: Composite health signal for this lead. Healthy = active engagement and on schedule. At Risk = SLA approaching or engagement declining. Critical = SLA breached or no activity in extended period. Calculated by the stale detection scheduled job or updated by the service layer on key events.
CustomField.helpText: Overall lead health: Healthy (on track), At Risk (SLA approaching), or Critical (SLA breached).
CustomField.label: Lead Health
